title: rubus serpens var. decurtatus
intro: Rubus serpens var. decurtatus, also known as the creeping raspberry or wild raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus serpens species, which is a type of bramble plant. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus serpens var. decurtatus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. It can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
